title: Mildly Spicy Malaysian Lamb Curry
description: A tangy and tender Malaysian dish featuring lamb, baby lettuce leaves, and a mildly spicy curry sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This halal-friendly recipe is made with score-fat lamb and cooked in a kadhai.
instructions: Heat oil in a kadhai over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger and saute until the onion is translucent.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the coconut milk, tomato paste, and 1 cup of water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 hour, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the baby lettuce leaves and cook until wilted.
Season with salt and serve hot.
